Operation 'updateSiteConfig' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too vague about what fields can be updated and lacks critical details. Improved description specifies the request schema, clarifies partial update support, identifies the response schema, notes authentication requirement, and explains side effects (immediate application and impact on site operations). This enables AI agents to understand the operation's scope, prerequisites, and consequences before execution.

data.current_description: Updates the configuration for a Tesla energy site. Any combination of configuration fields can be provided.
data.description_suggestion: Updates the configuration for a Tesla energy site. Accepts a SiteConfigUpdateRequest with any combination of configuration fields (partial updates supported). Returns the updated SiteConfigResponse with the new configuration values. Requires bearer token authentication. Configuration changes take effect immediately and may affect site operations including solar, battery, and grid power management.
